name: @therceman/agent-router
description: Token-efficient, deterministic multi-agent development workflow router

scripts.test: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run test:compile && node scripts/run-tests.mjs
scripts.test:unit: npm run clean && npm run test:compile && node scripts/run-tests.mjs unit
scripts.test:integration: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run test:compile && node scripts/run-tests.mjs integration
scripts.test:routing: npm run clean && npm run test:compile && node --test .test-dist/tests/unit/router.test.js
scripts.test:provider: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run test:compile && node --test .test-dist/tests/integration/provider.test.js
scripts.test:review-pack: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run test:compile && node --test .test-dist/tests/integration/review-pack.test.js
scripts.prepack: npm run quality-gates && npm run build
scripts.test:project: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run test:compile && node --test .test-dist/tests/integration/project.test.js .test-dist/tests/integration/zero-footprint.test.js

author: therceman
